playlist_title: EXTREME ENERGY ⚡ Ultimate Workout Power Playlist
playlist_description: An explosive workout playlist engineered for maximum energy output. Featuring aggressive electronic, industrial, and bass-heavy tracks designed to push you past every limit and ignite unstoppable gym performance.
playlist_strategy: Rapid warm-up ignition transitioning to extreme high-energy peaks with relentless intensity, followed by a controlled descent through sustained power into recovery cooldown.

tracks.title: Adrenaline Primer
tracks.youtube_title: ACTIVATE ⚡ Electro House Gym Warm Up | Adrenaline Rush
tracks.style_summary: Energetic electro house with a driving groove to kickstart the session.
tracks.song_structure: Intro - Build - Drop - Breakdown - Drop - Outro
tracks.music_generation_prompt: Instrumental gym workout music with hi-fi modern production quality. Genre: Electronic. Subgenre: Electro House. BPM: 126. Key: D Minor. Groove description: Driving, pulsing, and forward-moving. Bass style: Tight, punchy mid-bass with sub-bass support. Drum pattern: Four-on-the-floor with crisp snares and rapid hi-hats. Synth textures: Bright electro leads, shimmering arps, and filtered sweeps. Arrangement hints: Quick intro hook into a building groove, raising intensity without peaking. Strong hook within first 5 seconds featuring a catchy synth riff. Gym motivation vibe: Adrenaline ignition, preparing the body for extreme output. High energy dynamics but building. Clean professional mastering.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic gym photography, athletic fitness aesthetic, waist-up athlete framing. A lean athlete warming up with dynamic stretches under electric blue neon lighting in a modern gym. One strong central subject, clear focal point, high contrast lighting, minimal clutter. Gunmetal grey background with blue rim lighting highlighting physical form. Shallow depth of field with atmospheric haze for parallax animation.
tracks.youtube_description: Ignite your adrenaline with this electro house warm-up banger! 🔵 Get your blood pumping and your muscles ready for the extreme session ahead. Activate beast mode now! ⚡ #ElectroHouse #GymWarmUp #WorkoutMotivation #FitnessEnergy #AdrenalineRush
